generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force strategist, I've seen firsthand how critical strategic autonomy is for our national security. Remember, when it comes to national security, it's better to be self-reliant than to hope others will have our back. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
